content:
https://bytecodealliance.org/articles/WASI-0.3

WASI 3.0 has launched bringing with it native builtin primitives for async and streaming.

I see a bright future for Roc and WASI 3.0 :grinning_face_with_smiling_eyes:

You can write platforms so that app authors only need to run roc build my_component.roc and they will get a my_component.wasm module.
